---
title: "Textbooks"
listing:
  contents: "books/*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [title, subtitle, description, categories]
  feed: false
page-layout: full
---

Online textbooks and lecture notes.

*Textbooks in progress are kept in private repositories until release.*

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## How to add a book

1. Copy `books/_template/` to `books/book-name/`.
2. Edit `_quarto.yml` and the chapter `.qmd` files.
3. Remove `draft: true` from the book's `index.qmd` front-matter when ready.
4. Run `quarto render` — the listing picks it up automatically.
:::
